summary: Lane AH-003 completed successfully. Fixed 4 correctness bugs in packages/opencode/src/tool/coordination.ts: (1) wave_status query changed from AND+eq to inArray so runningTasks query actually works; (2) added dedup check in claimTask fan-out to prevent inflated task_ids on retries; (3) added 5-min stale detection for path reservations across checkPathReserved, reservePath, and the reservations tool query; (4) added XML escaping (escapeXml) for all user-controlled fields in formatStructuredResult to prevent malformed output and prompt injection. Zero new type errors. Only one file modified.
